channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Zimbabwe launches world’s first Global University of Inclusivity
item.description: Theseus Mauruki Shambare ZIMBABWE has launched what is being described as the world’s first Global University of Inclusivity (GUI), an institution founded on the principle of inclusivity as its... #Zimbabwe #Education #ZimbabweEducation #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Hybrid Seed Leading Revival of Cotton Farming in Zimbabwe @263Chat
item.description: A new generation of hybrid cotton seeds is giving Zimbabwean farmers fresh reason for optimism. Developed to deliver higher yields and withstand climate shocks and pests, the seeds are helping to boost productivity and improve livelihoods in farming communities. By Elia Ntali, bi #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Malawian National Dies on Repatriation Bus En Route to Beitbridge Border Post
item.description: Malawian National Dies on Repatriation Bus En Route to Beitbridge Border Post A Malawian national has died after suddenly falling ill while being transported on a repatriation bus from the Musina Temporary Repatriation Centre in Limpopo. The man was among undocumented foreign nat #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: We Are Worried About Uncertain Future, Two Siblings Declare As They Return To Zim From SA
item.description: By A Correspondent| Two undocumented Zimbabwean siblings who were born and grew up in South Africa say they are deeply... Continue reading \"We Are Worried About Uncertain Future, Two Siblings Declare As They Return To Zim From SA\" #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mining Firm’s CSR Delivers Modern School for Shamva @263Chat
item.description: A gold mining company operating in Shamva has transformed access to education for hundreds of children after investing in the construction and expansion of Zvitokwe Primary School in a corporate social responsibility (CSR) initiative that community leaders say has significantly i #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: NetOne Launches ‘Freedom Bundles’ to Boost Affordable Connectivity Across Zimbabwe @263Chat @NetOneCellular
item.description: State-owned mobile network operator NetOne has unveiled a new range of “Freedom Bundles” expanding its prepaid offerings with voice, SMS and data packages as it seeks to improve affordable access to digital communication across Zimbabwe. The new bundles replace the company’s long-running Khuluma 24/7 package [...] The post NetOne Launches ‘Freedom Bundles’ to Boost Affordable Connectivity Across Zimbabwe appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Sangomas Want HIV Test Kits As Traditional Healers Warn Of Patients Dying
item.description: Sangomas And Traditional Healers Make Major HIV Testing Kits Appeal Sangomas and traditional healers in Zimbabwe have made a major appeal for HIV rapid testing kits as they push for a bigger role in early diagnosis and patient referrals. The practitioners say testing patients on the spot could help them identify possible HIV cases and [...] The post Zimbabwe’s Sangomas Want HIV Test Kits As Traditional Healers Warn Of Patients Dying appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: ‘We Had No Choice’: Zimbabwean Family Sells Everything and Leaves South Africa (video)
item.description: Watch the heartbreaking moment a Zimbabwean family explains why leaving South Africa became their only option for survival and hope. The post ‘We Had No Choice’: Zimbabwean Family Sells Everything and Leaves South Africa (video) appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: CFAO Zimbabwe launches hybrid SUV as demand for fuel-efficient vehicles grows
item.description: Ivan Zhakata Herald Correspondent CFAO Mobility Zimbabwe has expanded its vehicle portfolio with the launch of the Suzuki Across, a premium mild hybrid sport utility vehicle (SUV), as the company... (via H-metro) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: H-metro

item.title: Zim Photographer’s Childhood Journey Takes Centre Stage in New International Exhibition @263Chat
item.description: Zimbabwean documentary photographer Tafadzwa Mupfururirwa Kufa is showcasing a deeply personal body of work exploring childhood, migration and identity in a new exhibition titled A Narrow Escape, bringing an intimate Zimbabwean story to an international audience. The exhibition draws on Kufa’s childhood experiences after he [...] The post Zim Photographer’s Childhood Journey Takes Centre Stage in New International Exhibition appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Suzuki Unveils Premium Hybrid SUV as CFAO Mobility Expands Zim Investment @263Chat
item.description: By Tinomudaishe Muzanenhamo CFAO Mobility Zimbabwe has unveiled the all-new Suzuki Across, a premium mild hybrid sport utility vehicle (SUV) as the company steps up its investment in Zimbabwe’s automotive sector amid rising demand for fuel-efficient, technologically advanced vehicles. Retailing at US$34 000, the new [...] The post Suzuki Unveils Premium Hybrid SUV as CFAO Mobility Expands Zim Investment appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Thabani Maguranyanga Launches Flag Football Revolution @263Chat
item.description: By Shalom Shawurwa Former Zimbabwe Cheetahs rugby player Thabani “TJ” Maguranyanga has launched Zimbabwe’s first major flag football development camp introducing the fast-growing American sport to local schoolchildren while pursuing his own dream of securing a place in the National Football League (NFL). The 23-year-old, [...] The post Thabani Maguranyanga Launches Flag Football Revolution appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Government Recovers 30 Cars in Zimbabwe’s US$15 Million Massive Corruption Crackdown... Here are the names of ‘vanhu vanyura so far’!
item.description: Harare – The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) of Zimbabwe has announced a significant recovery of nearly US$15 million from criminal proceeds, a move widely lauded as a major step in the fight against pervasive corruption. However, beneath the surface of this apparent victory lies a complex web of illicit activities that raises more questions than [...] The post Government Recovers 30 Cars in Zimbabwe’s US$15 Million Massive Corruption Crackdown... Here are the names of ‘vanhu vanyura so far’! first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Bulawayo council road levy usage under spotlight
item.description: Nqobile Bhebhe, THE City of Bulawayo could be collecting as much as US$3,1 million annually from its Roads Levy, exceeding its 2025 Zimbabwe National Road Administration (Zinara) allocation of... (via Ebusiness Weekly) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Man charged over trafficking of job seekers into Russia’s war effort
item.description: One recruit reported dead on war front The post Man charged over trafficking of job seekers into Russia’s war effort appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. (via Zimbabwean News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Chivayo not under investigation in South Africa over ZEC election procurement allegations – Hawks say @wicknellchivayo
item.description: South Africa’s Directorate for Priority Crime Investigation (Hawks) has said that controversial businessman Wicknell Chivayo is not under investigation over allegations linked to the procurement of election materials for Zimbabwe’s 2023 harmonised elections. The clarification follows claims that South African authorities were investigating Chivayo for alleged money laundering and fraud involving the procurement of election [...] The post Chivayo not under investigation in South Africa over ZEC election procurement allegations – Hawks say appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News
